---
title: "Classification II"
subtitle: "Support vector machines"
date: "Oct 2, 2026"
date-format: long
---

Maximum margin classifiers; the soft-margin extension; kernel SVMs for non-linear decision boundaries.

**Assigned reading:** ISLR ch. 9

---

## Materials

**Slides:** [Slides](class6_clean.pdf) | [Annotated slides](class6_annotated.pdf)

**Code:** [app1.R](code/app1.R) [fig1.R](code/fig1.R) [fig2.R](code/fig2.R) [fig3.R](code/fig3.R) [lab1.R](code/lab1.R) [lab1.Rmd](code/lab1.Rmd)

**Supplementary readings:** [Jones and Farrow (2025)](readings/Jones and Farrow (2025).pdf)
